overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk through a futuristic urban street. The player encounters pedestrians and observes a large flying aerial vehicle with illuminated advertisements passing overhead before continuing past neon-lit storefronts and graffiti-covered buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk lined with palm trees approaching downtown

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk toward the city center, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt walking toward camera and passing by on the right
woman in yellow jacket and teal pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines stretching across the street
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows against the purple dusk sky
paved pedestrian walkway with red painted curb
tall modern street lights beginning to illuminate in the fading light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an urban sidewalk at dusk. Palm trees line the left side while power lines and street lamps frame the right. The distant downtown skyline glows against the darkening sky as the player passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: large flying aerial vehicle with illuminated advertisements and spotlights enters the frame from the left
camera tilts upward and tracks the flying vehicle as it moves slowly across the sky

agents.ego_description: stops walking to look up and track the flying vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: flying AV with bright spotlights and digital billboard displaying advertisements

entered.detail: large rectangular aerial vehicle with multiple spotlights and illuminated digital screens on its underside
low-rise building with green facade and bright pink neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to follow a massive flying billboard vehicle that enters from the left, hovering with bright spotlights against the dusk sky. The vehicle slowly traverses the frame while the camera tracks its movement, revealing a green commercial building with pink neon lights below and the downtown skyline shifting in the background.

events.description: camera returns to street level and continues walking past commercial buildings with bright signage

agents.ego_description: resumes walking along the sidewalk past illuminated shop fronts and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: bright cyan and pink neon advertisements and storefront illumination
low building with blue graffiti tags and brick texture
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and continues walking past vibrant neon storefronts with cyan and pink lighting. A graffiti-covered building appears on the left while the palm trees continue in the distance. The concrete overpass structure becomes visible ahead as the player moves deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic urban sidewalk at dusk that transitions from a residential street into a vibrant commercial district. It begins by moving past palm trees and street lamps toward a glowing downtown skyline, weaving through pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. As the camera tilts upward, it tracks a massive flying billboard vehicle with bright spotlights that traverses the darkening sky, momentarily revealing a green building accented with pink neon lights below. The view then returns to street level to continue past storefronts bathed in cyan and pink lighting and a graffiti-covered wall. Finally, the scene shifts toward a concrete overpass as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit heart of the city.
